title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs resource apis, idempotency, concurrency, pagination, and consistency from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the consistent resource API and operation ledger. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for consistent resource API and operation ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.
Scope idempotency keys to principal and operation, compare canonical request fingerprints, store outcome atomically, expire deliberately, and reject mismatches.
Connect version columns, ETags, preconditions, atomic updates, affected-row checks, conflict disclosure, and safe retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Resource State Machine · changed case · Review Resource State Machine
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 3856 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then rotate a signing key while an old valid session remains within policy. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.

Which action demonstrates Resource State Machine without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Resource State Machine · changed case · Review Resource State Machine.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout. For Node and Express server Resource State Machine · changed case · Review Resource State Machine, keep Resource State Machine connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
